variables.input:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name)
| fields test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name 
| dedup test_name

fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, $Test_Name) 
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name
| dedup script_name

fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, $Test_Name) 
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, $Script_Name) 
| fields step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name
| dedup step_name

fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, $Test_Name)
| fields dt.entity.host
| dedup dt.entity.host

fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| filter in(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, $Test_Name)
| fields dt.entity.process_group
| dedup dt.entity.process_group

0.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, vu=request_attribute.Test.Virtual.User
//Filter Param here
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name) 
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name) 
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)

| summarize Active_Users = countDistinct(vu)//, by:{request_attribute.Test.Step.Name}

3.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, vu=request_attribute.Test.Virtual.User
//Filter Param here
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name) 
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name) 
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)

| summarize Request_Count = count()//, by: {bin(timestamp, 1m)}

5.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)

| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, vu=request_attribute.Test.Virtual.User, http.response.status_code
//Filter Param here
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name) 
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name) 
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)

| summarize Successful_Requests = countIf(http.response.status_code < 400),
            Error_Requests = countIf(http.response.status_code > 400)
//| fields Success_Rate_Percentage = (toDouble(Successful_Requests) / toDouble(Total_Requests)) * 100

6.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, vu=request_attribute.Test.Virtual.User, http.response.status_code

//Filter Param here
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name) 
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name) 
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)

//Summary
| summarize Total_Requests = count(), 
            Successful_Requests = countIf(http.response.status_code < 400)
| fields Success_Rate_Percentage = (toDouble(Successful_Requests) / toDouble(Total_Requests)) * 100

9.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name, test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name, step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name, vu=request_attribute.Test.Virtual.User, http.response.status_code
//Filter Param here
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name) 
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name) 
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)

//Summary
| summarize Total_Requests = count(), 
            Successful_Requests = countIf(http.response.status_code > 400)
| fields Success_Rate_Percentage = (toDouble(Successful_Requests) / toDouble(Total_Requests)) * 100

14.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name,
         test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name,
         script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name,
         duration,
         cpu_time=span.timing.cpu,
         cpu_self=span.timing.cpu_self,
         http.response.status_code
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)
| summarize Average_Response_Time = avg(duration),
            Throughput = count(),
            Successful_Requests = countIf(http.response.status_code < 400),
            Error_Requests = countIf(http.response.status_code >= 400),
            CPU_Time = avg(cpu_time),
            CPU_Self_Time = avg(cpu_self),
            by:{step_name}
| sort step_name asc

17.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields service=k8s.workload.name,
         namespace=k8s.namespace.name,
         test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name,
         script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name,
         step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name,
         duration,
         cpu_time=span.timing.cpu,
         http.response.status_code
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)
| filter isNotNull(service)
| summarize Avg_Response_Time = avg(duration),
            Throughput = count(),
            Error_Requests = countIf(http.response.status_code >= 400),
            CPU_Time = avg(cpu_time),
            by:{service, namespace}
| sort Throughput desc
| limit 20

18.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields host=host.name,
         test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name,
         script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name,
         step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name,
         duration,
         cpu_time=span.timing.cpu,
         http.response.status_code
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)
| filter isNotNull(host)
| summarize Avg_Response_Time = avg(duration),
            Throughput = count(),
            Error_Requests = countIf(http.response.status_code >= 400),
            CPU_Time = avg(cpu_time),
            by:{host}
| sort Throughput desc
| limit 20

20.title: Response Time (avg & p95) by Step
20.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name,
         test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name,
         script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name,
         duration, start_time
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)
| makeTimeseries avg_resp = avg(duration),
                 p95_resp = percentile(duration, 95),
                 interval:1m, by:{step_name}, time:start_time

21.title: Throughput — Success vs Error
21.query:
fetch spans
| filter isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Script.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Load.Test.Name) and isNotNull(request_attribute.Test.Step.Name)
| fields test_name=request_attribute.Load.Test.Name,
         script_name=request_attribute.Load.Script.Name,
         step_name=request_attribute.Test.Step.Name,
         http.response.status_code, start_time
| filter in(test_name, $Test_Name)
| filter in(script_name, $Script_Name)
| filter in(step_name, $Step_Name)
| makeTimeseries Successful = countIf(http.response.status_code < 400),
                 Errors = countIf(http.response.status_code >= 400),
                 interval:1m, time:start_time

23.title: Host CPU Usage (%)
23.query:
timeseries cpu = avg(dt.host.cpu.usage), by:{dt.entity.host}, interval:1m
| filter in(dt.entity.host, $Host_Filter)
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)

24.title: Host Memory Usage (%)
24.query:
timeseries mem = avg(dt.host.memory.usage), by:{dt.entity.host}, interval:1m
| filter in(dt.entity.host, $Host_Filter)
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)

26.title: Process CPU Usage (%)
26.query:
timeseries pcpu = avg(dt.process.cpu.usage), by:{dt.entity.process_group}, interval:1m
| filter in(dt.entity.process_group, $ProcessGroup_Filter)
| fieldsAdd pg_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group)

27.title: Process Memory Usage (%)
27.query:
timeseries pmem = avg(dt.process.memory.usage), by:{dt.entity.process_group}, interval:1m
| filter in(dt.entity.process_group, $ProcessGroup_Filter)
| fieldsAdd pg_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group)
